headline: The YouTube gurus who made careers out of viral videos
summary: With thousands of YouTube creators relying on the platform for income, many are turning to strategists as essential advisors on how to keep videos viral. Sixty-seven million people consider themselves online content creators, according to a 2025 Goldman Sachs report. That number could rise to more than 100 million by 2030, Goldman estimates. CNBC's Alex Sherman and Zach Vallese report.
